source_pr.title: *: make config items `Performance.*`, `OOMAction` and `MemQuotaQuery` support hot-reloading
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Make some config items `Performance.*`, `OOMAction` and `MemQuotaQuery` support hot-reloading.
`Performance.TCPKeepAlive` and `Performance.StatsLease` are not supported now.

### What is changed and how it works?
1. Add a new HTTP API to let users trigger hot-reloading;
2. Update `config` package to let it support hot-reloading;
3. Wrap some variables with atomic to let them can be reloaded safely.

All supported config items are defined in variable `hotReloadConfigItems` in `main.go`;

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

symptoms: // potencial data race in unit test since `CommitMaxBackoff` will be updated
failure_signature: // potencial data race in unit test since `CommitMaxBackoff` will be updated
root_cause_explanation: Hot-reloading can update config-derived global variables (e.g., `tikv.CommitMaxBackoff`, derived from `TiKVClient.CommitTimeout`) while other goroutines/tests read them to construct backoff/commit logic, which can trigger DATA RACE reports under `-race`. This PR reduces the risk by restricting `hotReloadConfigItems` to a small safe set (e.g., `Performance.*`, `OOMAction`, `MemQuotaQuery`) and removing `CommitTimeout/CommitMaxBackoff` from the reload path so the backoff limit is set at startup and not mutated concurrently.
fix_pattern: Only hot-reload config items that are safe to mutate at runtime; for shared global variables used across goroutines, either synchronize updates (atomic/locks + consistent reads) or avoid hot-reloading them (restrict the hot-reload list) to prevent concurrent mutation during tests.

evidence: evidence: // potencial data race in unit test since `CommitMaxBackoff` will be updated

files: config/config.go, config/config_test.go, server/http_handler.go, tidb-server/main.go, go.mod, planner/core/cache.go, planner/core/optimizer.go, session/session.go, statistics/feedback.go, statistics/handle/handle.go, statistics/handle/update.go, statistics/table.go, ddl/ddl.go, ddl/ddl_worker.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, planner/core/prepare_test.go, store/tikv/2pc.go, store/tikv/backoff.go, executor/seqtest/prepared_test.go, executor/seqtest/seq_executor_test.go, planner/core/point_get_plan_test.go, planner/core/cbo_test.go, statistics/handle/update_test.go, store/tikv/2pc_test.go, store/tikv/lock_test.go, server/http_status.go
